angle: Guests message at every hour. The host should not have to be the one awake for it. Hostie answers in his voice, day and night.
brief: Feature-card, light. Product-led counterpart to the statement. Phone mockup of the full Messages inbox (phone-inbox.png), threads across Airbnb, Booking and more, all confirmed, so the read is breadth: every guest, every channel, handled. AI guest messaging is live, so present tense. Uses the inbox mockup rather than the single-thread v2 chat so it stays visually distinct from the existing ai-messaging feature-card video.

copy.headline: The inbox that answers itself
copy.subhead: Hostie replies to every guest across your channels, day and night, in a voice you set and control.
